entries.translation: Вы двое выглядите так, словно влюблены.

entries.word: We fell in love on our first date.
entries.translation: Мы полюбили друг друга на первом свидании.

entries.word: I think Tom had a good reason.
entries.translation: Я думаю, у Тома была уважительная причина.

entries.word: I was named after my great-grandfather.
Tom is a very straightforward person.
Love is in the air.
My father lectured me for smoking.
entries.translation: Мой отец отчитал меня за курение.

entries.word: Tom is my neighbor's grandson.
Tom isn't Mary's biological father.
entries.translation: Том не является биологическим отцом Мэри.

entries.word: May I see my daughter?
When you love what you do, it shows.
entries.translation: Когда любишь своё дело, это заметно.

entries.word: Have you met my sister?
Tom's children speak French perfectly.
My parents were murdered.
I helped my father yesterday.
My parents are so unfair.
Tom is a very kind person.
Tom is the same height as his father.
entries.translation: Том такого же роста, как отец.

entries.word: Why were you in prison?
entries.translation: За что ты сидел в тюрьме?

entries.word: You should tell Tom that you love Mary.
entries.translation: Тебе надо сказать Тому, что ты любишь Мэри.

entries.word: Bring your daughter.
You were in love with Tom, weren't you?
entries.translation: Ты ведь была влюблена в Тома, я прав?

entries.word: Tom punished his son for lying.
entries.translation: Том наказал своего сына за ложь.

entries.word: Tom isn't currently in prison.

Are you planning on having children?
